description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish Docs that runs on push to master and feature branches in the ant-design-blazor repository. The workflow checks out the code, sets up .NET Core 3.1 and 5.0, Node.js 10.x, runs tests, uploads coverage to Codecov, determines the next semantic version, packages a nightly NuGet package, uploads it as an artifact, pushes it to MyGet, syncs the repository to Gitee, publishes documentation, and deploys a preview.
